site.name: Tuukka Pitkänen
site.title: Tuukka Pitkänen — Portfolio
site.description: Portfolio of Tuukka Pitkänen: web development, React, programming projects, and collaboration details.

about.title: About
paragraphs: I am a 25-year-old from Oulu with a strong passion for programming. My social skills and ability to listen help me understand people's needs and turn them into working digital solutions.

I am a diligent builder who sees projects through to completion. I am self-taught and have worked with React, React Native, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and Java — with React and React Native at the center of my focus.
In my free time I listen to music, play games, and create my own music. Below is one of my tracks on SoundCloud.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: My current programming and tool skills.

resume.title: Résumé
resume.summary: 25 years old, originally from Kemijärvi, military service completed. Business graduate by education. Strengths include self-directed learning, diligence, and teamwork. Interested in game and website development.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Choose a category or open a project page for details and images.

contact.title: Contact
contact.sectionDescription: Send a message — I typically reply within a few business days.
contact.socialHint: You can also reach me on social media — links below.

form.intro: Tell me about your project, collaboration idea, or question. All fields are required.
form.name: Your name
form.subject: Subject
form.privacy: Your message is sent securely via email. No mailto links — spam protection is enabled.
form.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. I will get back to you as soon as I can.
form.notConfigured: The contact form is not configured on the server yet (missing API keys).

errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.NETWORK: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.VALIDATION: Please check the form fields and try again.
errors.RATE_LIMIT: Too many messages sent. Please wait an hour and try again.
errors.TOKEN_INVALID: Session expired. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.TIMING_INVALID: Please wait a moment before sending.
errors.SPAM_DETECTED: Your message could not be sent. Remove extra links or promotional content.
errors.TURNSTILE_FAILED: Security check failed. Please try again.
errors.TURNSTILE_REQUIRED: Complete the security check before sending.
errors.EMAIL_NOT_CONFIGURED: Email is not configured on the server. Please use social links instead.
errors.SEND_FAILED: Could not deliver your message. Please try again or use LinkedIn/GitHub.
errors.NAME_TOO_SHORT: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.SUBJECT_TOO_SHORT: Subject must be at least 2 characters.
errors.MESSAGE_TOO_SHORT: Message must be at least 20 characters.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

neon-drift.title: Neon Drift
neon-drift.subtitle: Browser survival arcade
neon-drift.description: Neon Drift is a standalone browser survival shooter: dodge swarms from every direction, stack upgrades and synergies, and push for a spot on the global board. It started as a hidden portfolio experiment and now runs as its own app.

eternal-cry.title: Eternal-Cry
eternal-cry.subtitle: Video game
eternal-cry.description: An action platformer with a rich story, action, secrets, and enemies. Built with GameMaker Studio. I also started a website for the project. Currently on hold.

nothing-pending.title: Nothing Pending
nothing-pending.subtitle: Next.js — early development
nothing-pending.description: A Next.js project inspired by Papers, Please. Players review documents and make judgment calls under pressure. Super early in development.

the-archive-incident.title: The Archive Incident
the-archive-incident.subtitle: Next.js + PixiJS — early development
the-archive-incident.description: A semi-hard puzzle experience built with Next.js and PixiJS. Players piece together clues inside a digital archive. Early in development.
